name: Eggplant/Swiss Cheese Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion in oil until tender.
2. Add tomato paste, water, oregano, parsley, and salt. Simmer over low heat for 10 minutes.
3. Slice eggplant or zucchini into 1/4-inch-thick pieces.
4. Arrange slices in a lightly-oiled 9-by-13 inch baking pan.
5. Pour about 1/3 cup tomato sauce on top of the eggplant.
6. Add Swiss cheese slices, then another layer of eggplant and about 1/2 cup tomato sauce.
7. Mix remaining sauce with bread cubes and spread over eggplant.
8. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese evenly.
9. Bake at 325°F for approximately 25 minutes. Serves 6.
Calories: 385
Carbohydrates: 17
Protein: 26
Fat: 26
Sodium: 497
